changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md: replaced verbose documentation with concise instructions. Added strategy to use execute_command with cat instead of read_file (model produces malformed tool calls for read_file). Provided complete Python script template instead of separate code snippets. Simplified conversion table. Added explicit usage examples with command-line arguments.

Replaced f-strings with %-formatting in the Python template. The model was corrupting f-string syntax (dropping closing braces) when reproducing the code, causing SyntaxError loops that consumed all iterations and timed out.
Confirmation run - no changes. Both tasks scored 100/100 consistently.
